results.justification: EXACT TWIN — multi-agent debate judge with Beta-Binomial stability + KS-stopping IS the diverse-pool consensus criterion + stopping rule for re-grind.
EXACT TWIN — iterative ReWrite agent + judge feedback-loop IS the multi-stage re-grind rewrite-resubmit mechanism.
Agent-as-a-judge survey covers diverse verifier-pool ensemble paradigm functionally equivalent to vulture-judge pool.
Meta-judge multi-agent share-update on aggregate is the cross-judge consensus aggregation paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — Self-Refine FEEDBACK→REFINE loop IS the multi-stage re-grind rewrite-resubmit iteration paradigm at single-agent granularity.
Self-reflection accept-reject critique loop covers the iterative acceptance-criterion paradigm.
HalluLens benchmark for hallucination external acceptance criterion is the binary-accept/reject infrastructure.
Hallucination survey covers ensemble + critique-refine in catalog form — functional saturation.
